tasks.title: Custom tool discovery scans TOOL.md instead of .ts/.js
tasks.description: Modify DirectoryScanner::scan_tools() in crates/core/src/config/directory_scanner.rs:228 to change file extension filter from TOOL.md to .ts and .js. Parse JavaScript/TypeScript tool definitions with export default tool({...}) pattern. Extract tool name, description, and argument schema from parsed files.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify .ts files in .opencode/tools/ are discovered
AddUnitTest: verify .js files in .opencode/tools/ are discovered
AddUnitTest: verify tool name is extracted correctly from TypeScript definitions
AddUnitTest: verify tool description is extracted correctly from TypeScript definitions
AddUnitTest: verify argument schema is extracted from parsed files
AddIntegrationTest: verify discovery works for project-level (.opencode/tools/)
AddIntegrationTest: verify discovery works for global-level (~/.config/opencode/tools/)
AddRegressionTest: ensure TOOL.md files are no longer discovered
tasks.impl_notes: File extension filter change from TOOL.md to .ts/.js in scan_tools(). JavaScript/TypeScript parsing required for export default tool({...}) pattern.

tasks.title: Discovered tools recorded in config but NOT registered with ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Create registration flow from DirectoryScanner to ToolRegistry. Ensure discovered custom tools appear in tool listing. Verify custom tools can be executed through standard tool pipeline.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify DirectoryScanner registers discovered tools with ToolRegistry
AddUnitTest: verify custom tools appear in ToolRegistry listing after discovery
AddIntegrationTest: verify custom tool discovery -> registration -> execution pipeline
AddRegressionTest: ensure built-in tools still work after custom tool registration
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify proper error handling when custom tool parsing fails
tasks.impl_notes: Need to bridge DirectoryScanner discovery output to ToolRegistry registration. Add integration test for full discovery -> registration -> execution flow.

tasks.title: PluginToolAdapter exists but no mechanism to register plugin tools
tasks.description: Add register_tool() method to Plugin trait in crates/plugin/src/lib.rs. Implement tool registration in PluginManager. Integrate PluginManager with ToolRegistry for plugin-provided tools.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Plugin trait has register_tool() method
AddUnitTest: verify PluginManager implements tool registration
AddUnitTest: verify plugin tools appear in ToolRegistry after plugin activation
AddIntegrationTest: verify plugin tool registration -> execution pipeline
AddRegressionTest: ensure plugin tools respect permission system
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling when plugin registers invalid tool
tasks.impl_notes: Add register_tool() to Plugin trait. PluginManager handles registration. Plugin tools must respect permission gating like built-in tools.

tasks.title: Hooks execute in HashMap iteration order (non-deterministic)
tasks.description: Add explicit priority field to plugin/hook configuration. Replace HashMap iteration with ordered iteration using priority. Document execution order guarantees in code.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify hooks execute in priority order
AddIntegrationTest: verify deterministic execution order across multiple runs
AddRegressionTest: ensure same plugin order produces same hook execution order
tasks.impl_notes: Replace HashMap with ordered iteration using priority field. Document execution order guarantees.

tasks.title: Server/runtime and TUI plugin configs can be mixed
tasks.description: Add validation in config loading to separate plugin configs. Ensure opencode.json plugins stay in server/runtime domain. Ensure tui.json plugins stay in TUI domain.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify server/runtime plugins in opencode.json are accepted
AddUnitTest: verify TUI plugins in tui.json are accepted
AddUnitTest: verify server/runtime plugins in tui.json produce warning/error
AddUnitTest: verify TUI plugins in opencode.json produce warning/error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify mixed config detection works correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Add validation in config loading to enforce plugin config ownership boundaries.

tasks.title: No test verifying exactly-one-active-primary-agent
tasks.description: Add unit test verifying single active primary agent. Test that creating new primary agent deactivates previous. Test that hidden agents don't affect invariant.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify exactly one active primary agent per session
AddUnitTest: verify creating new primary agent deactivates previous
AddUnitTest: verify hidden agents (compaction, title, summary) don't affect invariant
AddIntegrationTest: verify invariant maintained across agent switches
tasks.impl_notes: Unit tests in crates/agent/ verifying single active primary agent invariant.

tasks.title: No unit tests for Project->Session->Message->Part ownership tree
tasks.description: Add unit test verifying ownership tree is acyclic. Test that cycles cannot be created. Add integration test for fork chain maintaining acyclicity.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ownership tree is acyclic (Project->Session->Message->Part)
AddUnitTest: verify cycles cannot be created (Project->Session->Message->Part->Project)
AddIntegrationTest: verify fork chain maintains acyclicity
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-core -- ownership_tree (30 tests)
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-core -- fork_acyclicity (8 tests)
tasks.impl_notes: Unit tests in crates/core/ verifying ownership tree acyclicity.

tasks.title: Missing create->fork->share->compact->revert integration test
tasks.description: Add integration test covering complete session lifecycle: Create session, Fork child session, Share session, Compact session, Revert to checkpoint. Verify session state integrity after each operation.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify session creation works correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify fork child session creates valid child
AddIntegrationTest: verify share/export mechanism works
AddIntegrationTest: verify compact (context compression) works
AddIntegrationTest: verify revert to checkpoint restores state
AddRegressionTest: verify message history preserved through all operations
tasks.impl_notes: Integration test covering full session lifecycle operations. Also fixed bug in StorageService::save_session where it was storing SessionModel JSON instead of Session JSON in data column.

tasks.title: Desktop app not implemented (stubs only)
tasks.description: Implement desktop startup flow in crates/cli/. Integrate WebView for desktop shell. Implement desktop-specific configuration handling. Add desktop mode to CLI argument parsing.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CLI argument parsing includes desktop mode
AddUnitTest: verify desktop configuration loading works
AddIntegrationTest: verify desktop app starts successfully
AddIntegrationTest: verify WebView displays TUI content
tasks.impl_notes: Added unit tests for CLI argument parsing (18 tests) covering DesktopArgs fields, port, hostname, no_browser, acp_enabled options. Added unit tests for desktop configuration loading (11 tests) covering config file loading, precedence logic, and ACP settings. Existing integration tests verify desktop app starts successfully.

tasks.title: Implement Web Server Mode
tasks.description: Implement full web server in crates/cli/src/cmd/web.rs. Add authentication protection to web endpoints. Implement session sharing between web and TUI modes. Add web-specific route handlers.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify web server endpoints are defined correctly
AddUnitTest: verify authentication protection on web endpoints
AddUnitTest: verify session sharing between web and TUI modes
AddIntegrationTest: verify web server serves authenticated endpoints
AddIntegrationTest: verify sessions accessible from both web and TUI interfaces
tasks.impl_notes: Enhanced web.rs with WebServerState struct for session sharing between web and TUI modes. Added SessionSharing integration. Created e2e_web_server.rs with 9 tests covering endpoint definition, session sharing, and health checks. Added 9 web_auth tests in server_integration_tests.rs covering API key authentication. All tests pass.

tasks.title: ACP transport not implemented (event structs exist)
tasks.description: Implement ACP handshake mechanism. Implement ACP transport layer for editor communication. Add connection management for ACP clients. Integrate with server for ACP endpoint handling.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ACP handshake mechanism completes successfully
AddUnitTest: verify ACP transport layer sends/receives messages
AddUnitTest: verify ACP client connection management
AddIntegrationTest: verify ACP handshake completes successfully
AddIntegrationTest: verify editor integration works via ACP transport
tasks.impl_notes: Implement ACP transport layer for editor communication with handshake mechanism.

tasks.title: Refactor Config Crate - crates/config/src/lib.rs is empty re-export
tasks.description: Move config logic from crates/core/src/config.rs to crates/config/. Ensure crates/config/ contains actual config implementation. Update imports in dependent crates. Verify config precedence and ownership still works.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify config logic resides in crates/config/ crate
AddUnitTest: verify config precedence works correctly after refactor
AddUnitTest: verify config ownership works correctly after refactor
AddIntegrationTest: verify all dependent crates import from crates/config/
AddRegressionTest: ensure all config functionality preserved after refactor
tasks.impl_notes: Move config implementation from core to dedicated config crate. Update all imports.

tasks.title: No automated tests for slash command execution
tasks.description: Add tests for /compact, /connect, /help commands and unknown/invalid slash commands. Implemented in crates/tui/tests/slash_command_tests.rs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify /compact command execution
AddUnitTest: verify /connect command execution
AddUnitTest: verify /help command execution
AddUnitTest: verify unknown/invalid slash commands handled correctly
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p opencode-tui -- slash (33 tests)
tasks.impl_notes: 28 tests added in crates/tui/tests/slash_command_tests.rs. Added filtered_commands() getter to SlashCommandOverlay.

tasks.title: TUI Input Model Tests - No tests for input model
tasks.description: Add tests for multiline input handling, input history navigation, and autocomplete triggering in TUI input model.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify multiline input handling works correctly
AddUnitTest: verify input history navigation (up/down arrows)
AddUnitTest: verify autocomplete triggering conditions
AddIntegrationTest: verify input model state transitions
tasks.impl_notes: 22 tests added in crates/tui/tests/input_model_tests.rs covering multiline input (Shift+Enter newline insertion, multi-line accumulation, regular Enter submits), input history navigation (previous/next/reset/dedup/max-size/search/clear), and autocomplete triggering (file ref @, slash command /, Tab completion, partial match, no-match, no-duplicates, cursor position).

tasks.title: TUI Sidebar Tests - No tests for sidebar visibility and content
tasks.description: Add tests for sidebar visibility toggle, file tree content, MCP/LSP status display, and diagnostics display.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify sidebar visibility toggle works
AddUnitTest: verify file tree content displays correctly
AddUnitTest: verify MCP/LSP status display updates
AddUnitTest: verify diagnostics display shows errors/warnings
AddIntegrationTest: verify sidebar state persistence

tasks.title: Per-Agent Model Override Test - not explicitly tested
tasks.description: Add test for agent-specific model selection. Verify build agent uses default model. Verify model override affects only specified agent.

AddUnitTest: verify build agent uses default model
AddUnitTest: verify model override affects only specified agent
AddRegressionTest: ensure default agent model unchanged when override applied
tasks.impl_notes: Tests for per-agent model override functionality in LLM provider.

tasks.title: Route-Group Presence Tests - No integration tests for route groups
tasks.description: Add tests for session, config, provider, permission, and MCP route groups in server module.

AddIntegrationTest: verify permission route group handlers work
AddIntegrationTest: verify MCP route group handlers work

tasks.title: API Negative Tests - No negative tests for unauthorized/malformed requests
tasks.description: Add tests for unauthorized access (missing auth token), invalid auth token, malformed request bodies, and invalid session/message IDs.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify unauthorized access returns 401 without auth token
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify invalid auth token returns 401
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify malformed request body returns 400
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify invalid session ID returns 404
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify invalid message ID returns 404
AddRegressionTest: ensure valid requests still succeed after negative tests
tasks.impl_notes: Negative tests for API security covering auth failures and malformed requests.

tasks.title: Hidden vs Visible Agent UI Tests - untested behavior
tasks.description: Add tests for visible agents (build, plan) in selection flows and hidden agents (compaction, title, summary) not appearing in selection.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify visible agents (build, plan) appear in selection flows
AddUnitTest: verify hidden agents (compaction, title, summary) not in selection
AddUnitTest: verify UI displays correct agent list
AddRegressionTest: ensure agent visibility state persists correctly

tasks.title: Theme Auto-Sync Test - not tested on install
